items.title: [负面] Well... it seems this game is more for the goth an...
items.summary: Well... it seems this game is more for the goth and emo people. grey colors, sad looking characters, strange story. Monster Design is also strange. If you mind is on the happy side of life, I don't know why you should play this game.
